channel.title: Visual Effects on cmdragon's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Visual Effects on cmdragon's Blog

item.title: Image to Particles Effect - Transform Any Image into Stunning Particle Animations
item.description: 🎨 Powerful particle effect generator that transforms images into dynamic particle animations! Supports customizable particle size, density, movement trajectories, export as video or interactive HTML, perfect for visual effects, presentations, and artistic creation!
